STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK P. SCHREIBER FILED BY LSL PROPERTY HOLDINGS B14 DE LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-29-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARK P. SCHREIBER. BOTH PSRTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERREN, TRENT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LSL PROPERTY HOLDINGS B14 DE LLC JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT MET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF TO SHOW THERE WAS AN AGREEMENT THAT THE 30 DAY EXTENSION OF THE RELOCATION AGREEMENT PROVIDED FOR NO ADDITIONAL PAYMENT OF RENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (REQUEST MADE LESS THAN 10 DAYS) FILED BY DEFENDANT LSL PROPERTY HOLDINGS B14 DE LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2008 - JUDGMENT.
